title: selaginella tarda
intro: Selaginella tarda, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella tarda include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Selaginella tarda can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
